title: subquery with limit clause fails as EXISTS operand
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t5 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'alpha', 1.1), (2, 'beta', 2.2), (3, 'gamma', NULL);
CREATE TABLE t6(ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t5(id));
SELECT name FROM t5 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t6 WHERE (id = ref_id AND value = 2.2));
key_bug_features: EXISTS clause fails with LIMIT in subquery
